306.reason: [Error: The lexeme string is incorrectly constructed. It uses (char) currentChar after advance() has already consumed the closing quote, so currentChar is the character after the closing quote, not the escape character. It should use the escapeChar variable or the original escape sequence.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The lexeme string is incorrectly constructed. It uses (char) currentChar after advance() has already consumed the closing quote, so currentChar is the character after the closing quote, not the escape character. reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The lexeme string is incorrectly constructed. It uses (char) currentChar after advance() has already consumed the closing quote, so currentChar is the character after the quote, not the escape character. Additionally, the lexeme should represent the actual character constant, e.g., "'\\n'" for a newline, but the logic here is flawed.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: currentChar has been advanced past the closing quote, so it is not the escaped character. Should use the stored escapeChar or the character before the second advance.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  错误：此时currentChar已经是结尾的引号，而不是转义后的字符，导致生成的lexeme错误，应为保存被转义的字符后再构造
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  After advance() is called, currentChar points to the next character (likely the closing quote), not the escape character itself. This results in an incorrect lexeme for escape sequences.
